Event: Costumed Adventure
Event Date: 15/03/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: E33
Solo Performance Engraving

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, the engraving owner scares the nearest enemy for 2 sec and deals 35300 / 50400 / 72000 / 96000 / 120000 / 150000 / 195000 physical damage. The engraving owner also increases their health and damage by 19% / 20% / 21% / 22% / 24% / 27% / 30% for 3 sec.

Enhancement: 2
50000 Health from the gems
Once in a while, the engraving owner scares 2 nearest enemies for 3 sec and deals them 47000 / 67200 / 96000 / 128000 / 160000 / 200000 / 260000 physical damage for 3 sec. The engraving owner also increases their health, damage and physical, and magic armor by 29% / 30% / 31% / 32% / 34% / 37% / 40% for 4 sec.

Enhancement: 3
100000 Health from the gems
Once in a while, the engraving owner scares 3 nearest enemies for 4 sec and deals them physical damage equal to 15% / 16% / 17% / 18% / 20% / 22% / 25% of their max health for 4 sec. The engraving owner also goes into a frenzy. They increase in size, and all their stats are increased by 10% / 11% / 12% / 13% / 15% / 17% / 20% for 5 sec.
